notes: Framework and prompt hooks; ptymark does not source or rewrite shell startup files.
Prompt, aliases, and hooks remain shell-owned.
Readline replacement uses cursor controls and redraws; control-bearing lines bypass rendering.
Multiline and status-rich prompts are byte-preserved.
Git prompt colors and cursor sequences are byte-preserved.
Powerline glyph and SGR output is preserved.
Prompt output and shell hooks remain outside semantic detection.
Prompt segments, right prompts, and OSC output are preserved.
preexec/precmd hooks are not modified or reordered.
Completion redraw and menu control bytes bypass semantic rendering.
Full-screen/cursor-addressed UI is passed through unchanged.
fzf UI is passed through unchanged.
Interactive history UI bypasses rendering; hook variables are preserved.
Directory hooks and environment changes are shell-owned.
Environment export hooks are not intercepted.
Directory tracking hooks are not intercepted.
Completion output and cursor controls remain byte-exact.
Interactive selector bypasses semantic rendering.
Full-screen terminal UI bypasses semantic rendering.
Activation hooks and environment mutation remain shell-owned.
